# Create high-level product comparison

## Task

Update:

`reports/comparisons/high-level-product-comparison.md`

Use `templates/high-level-comparison-template.md`.

## Requirements

1. **Always read `feature-dictionary.md` first** — it defines the 11 canonical Feature IDs (F-CONN, F-QUERY, …, F-SCHED) and feature display names.
2. Compare products at the feature-group level using Feature IDs from the dictionary.
3. Keep rows normalized across third-party and 3t products.
4. Highlight parity, differentiators, and strategic gaps.
5. Include source traceability to product reports and feature artifacts.
6. Add a `Navigation` section linking cumulative report, feature dictionary, low-level comparison, and all analyzed product reports.
7. Feature group rows must use the Feature ID column (`F-CONN`, `F-QUERY`, etc.).
